codeReview.summary: The project scaffolding is clean and comprehensive. TanStack Start v1 is properly configured with React 19, TypeScript (strict mode), Tailwind CSS v4, and shadcn/ui. The landing page at `/` has t3ingo branding (custom Fraunces/Manrope fonts), a heading, subtitle, description, and a Play button. The Play button uses `crypto.getRandomValues()` to generate a 10-character alphanumeric seed and navigates to `/game?seed={seed}`. The game route uses Zod for search param validation. Root layout includes proper meta tags (title, description, OG tags), favicon reference, and charset/viewport declarations. Dev server is configured on port 3000. SSR is confirmed working via curl verification. No bugs, security issues, or significant code quality concerns found.

issues.description: Minor modulo bias in seed generation: `chars[byte % chars.length]` where chars.length=62 and byte range is 0-255. Since 256 is not evenly divisible by 62, characters at indices 0-5 (A-F) have a ~0.4% higher probability. Completely negligible for a bingo game seed, but noted for completeness.
manifest.json still has scaffold default values ('TanStack App', 'Create TanStack App Sample'). Should be updated to 't3ingo' branding in a future pass, but not blocking for this foundation feature.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md references `app/routes/` and `app/lib/` as the source directory, but the actual implementation uses `src/routes/` and `src/lib/`. This is the standard TanStack Start scaffold layout. AGENTS.md should be updated to reflect `src/` paths instead of `app/` paths.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md says 'routes go in app/routes/' and lists 'app/routes/__root.tsx', 'app/lib/bingo.ts', etc. Actual files are at src/routes/__root.tsx, src/lib/utils.ts, etc.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The project uses TanStack Start v1 with file-based routing where routes live in `src/routes/` (not `app/routes/`). The routeTree.gen.ts is auto-generated by the @tanstack/router-plugin. No explicit entry-client.tsx or entry-server.tsx files are needed — TanStack Start handles this internally. Workers building subsequent features need to know the `src/` directory convention.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Project structure: src/routes/__root.tsx, src/routes/index.tsx, src/routes/game.tsx, src/lib/utils.ts, src/router.tsx, src/routeTree.gen.ts

sharedStateObservations.observation: No explicit Vercel deployment config (vercel.json) was created. TanStack Start handles Vercel deployment natively via the Nitro adapter configured in the tanstackStart() Vite plugin. This matches architecture.md's deployment section but future workers should know no manual Vercel config is needed.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: vite.config.ts uses tanstackStart() plugin, no vercel.json exists. architecture.md says 'Build: TanStack Start via Nitro adapter → Vercel serverless functions'

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-worker SKILL.md example handoff references `app/lib/` and `app/components/` paths, which don't match the actual project structure using `src/`. The skill's example code paths should be updated or a note added about the src/ convention.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: SKILL.md example handoff mentions 'app/lib/bingo.ts', 'app/lib/items.ts', 'app/components/Board.tsx'. Actual project uses src/ prefix.

summary: PASS. The project-setup feature is well-implemented and meets all requirements. TanStack Start is properly scaffolded with TypeScript strict mode, Tailwind CSS v4, shadcn/ui, and all necessary configuration. The landing page renders correctly with branding, heading, and a Play button that generates unique seeds using crypto.getRandomValues(). The game route has Zod search param validation. SSR works correctly (verified via curl). Page title, meta description, OG tags, and favicon are all properly configured. The only notable gap is an AGENTS.md convention mismatch: it references `app/` directory paths but the actual project uses `src/` paths. Two minor non-blocking issues were noted: trivial modulo bias in seed generation (irrelevant for bingo) and scaffold defaults remaining in manifest.json.
